title: Axor Lab Reproduction Attestation
description: An append-only, independently-signed record that someone reproduced a publication. Kept OUT of the immutable publication body so the count can grow without mutating the record. Typed by reproduction kind.

kind.description: exact_replay = verdicts over frozen traces, bit-identical (strongest for the verdict claim). fresh_live = new stochastic run within CI (the generalizing claim). changed_model/kernel = robustness, a DIFFERENT claim.

result.description: what they observed, with their own CI where live

bundle_ref.description: hash of their reproduction bundle, if published
